what: 2026-03-10 — Add flow parameter to all snake functions
title: Changes
text: R/layout.R: Added flow param (“snake”/“natural”) compute_snake_layout(). Added bands$read_direction field — separates content ordering arc geometry (bands$direction). R/sequence_snake.R: Added flow param, default “natural”. Content placement uses read_direction instead direction. R/timeline_snake.R: Added flow param, default “natural”. Passes sequence_snake(). R/activity_snake.R: Added flow param, default “snake”. Grid lines event blocks use read_direction. R/survey_snake.R: Added flow param, default “snake”. Content refs use read_direction. R/line_snake.R: Added flow param, default “snake”. Content placement uses read_direction. R/survey_sequence.R: Added flow param, default “snake”. Content refs use read_direction. R/multi_snake.R: Added flow param, default “snake”. R/render.R: draw_band_labels() uses read_direction align="direction". functions: Added @param flow roxygen documentation. R/activity_snake.R: Arc labels now flow-aware — natural mode, right arcs show day-end label, left arcs show day-start label. Accounts start_from direction. R/survey_sequence.R: Fixed arc gradient use bands$direction (geometry) instead bands$read_direction end-level color. R/survey_snake.R: Fixed first end cap respect bands$direction[1] instead hardcoding “left”. R/multi_snake.R: Fixed end_cap_polygon argument order (passing y_top/y_bottom instead y_center/radius). Tests: 34 new tests test-flow.R. Full suite: 502 pass, 0 fail, 100% coverage. R CMD check –-cran: 0 errors, 0 warnings, 2 NOTEs.

what: 2026-03-09 — smart input coercion, parse_time(), flexible formats
title: Changes
text: R/utils.R: Added parse_time() — robust timestamp parser (40+ formats, Unix timestamps, auto-unit detection, year validation). Inspired tna’s parse_time(). R/utils.R: Added coerce_sequence_input() — accepts vectors, data.frames (auto-extract first char/factor column), lists, comma-separated strings. NAs dropped warning. R/utils.R: Added find_column() — case-insensitive column name matching. R/utils.R: Enhanced coerce_activity_input() — accepts character/numeric timestamp vectors via parse_time(), case-insensitive column matching, aliased column names (date→day, begin→start, dur→duration, activity→label), auto-detects POSIXct columns. R/utils.R: Enhanced coerce_survey_input() — auto-labels matrix rownames/colnames, NA handling message, improved heuristic raw vs counts detection. R/utils.R: Enhanced validate_activity_data() — case-insensitive column name resolution. R/sequence_snake.R: Uses coerce_sequence_input() flexible input (string, data.frame, list, NA handling). Updated roxygen docs. R/timeline_snake.R: to_date() uses parse_time() flexible date parsing (handles month names, DD/MM/YYYY, Unix timestamps, POSIXt). R/snakeplot-package.R: Added na.omit stats imports. tests/testthat/test-utils.R: Added 38 tests parse_time (20), coerce_sequence_input (10), find_column (5), enhanced coerce_activity_input (5), enhanced coerce_survey_input (3), case-insensitive validate_activity_data (1). tests/testthat/test-sequence_snake.R: Added 6 integration tests flexible input formats + updated NA test. title: Session Handoff — 2026-03-10
text: Bump version releasing CRAN Consider adding docs/ .Rbuildignore suppress top-level NOTE

title: Learnings
text: [flow parameter naming] flow="snake" = boustrophedon (alternating direction). flow="natural" = bands direction (like folded ribbon laid flat, consistent reading order). meaning EVERY function — special cases per function. reverse meanings. [flow defaults] timeline_snake() sequence_snake() default flow="natural". functions (activity_snake, survey_snake, line_snake, survey_sequence, multi_snake) default flow="snake". functions accept values. [direction vs read_direction] bands$direction controls arc geometry (always alternates). bands$read_direction controls content/block ordering within bands. snake mode ’re ; natural mode read_direction uniform direction still alternates. End caps follow direction, content follows read_direction. [activity arc labels] natural mode, arc labels must show correct time side: right arcs = day_end start_from="left", day_start start_from="right". snake mode, arcs show day_end (midnight). [flow visual difference] Uniform random data looks reversed . Use asymmetric data (e.g. morning-events) demonstrate flow difference examples.

title: Learnings
text: [cor zero-SD] stats::cor() warns standard deviation zero (constant data). Guard sd() > 0 check calling cor(). Add sd @importFrom stats. [vignette fig.height] User strongly dislikes tall/thick plots. Default fig.height=5 (setup chunk) fine . Don’t increase unless explicitly asked. Activity plots use fig.height=6. [parse_time year validation] strptime %Y/%m/%d “15/01/2024” happily treats “15” year 0015. Must validate parsed years 1900-2100 range accepting format match. [parse_time YYYY-MM] strptime handle %Y-%m without day. Must pre-process “2024-01” → “2024-01-01” format loop. [numeric start column] coerce_activity_input() must parse numeric start columns Unix timestamps — represent minutes--midnight activity_snake context. parse character columns via parse_time(). [coerce_sequence_input NA] Changed hard error NAs warning + drop. user-friendly messy data. Updated existing test expect_error expect_warning. [timeline label overlap] State labels inside bands must skip drawing run narrow (check strwidth). Transition labels go bottom edge band (28% bottom), centered — avoids overlap state names. Band year labels go centered gap bands. timeline_snake needs band_gap = 30 (18) fit year labels. [vignette short examples] Users hate snake plots 1-2 rows — “snakes”. vignette examples must enough data 3+ rows. [rug style] Dark ribbon background (draw_ribbon()) creates thick visible border rug ticks — user strongly dislikes. Use light #F5F5F5 band background + #EBEBEB arcs/end caps instead. [rug jitter] High jitter (0.8) makes rug look like distribution/scatter plot. Subtle (0.3) better user still prefers jitter. Best ~100 events; 1000 events block style cleaner. [proportional distribution] new function needed — just sort input frequency calling sequence_snake(). User explicitly rejected multi_snake() unnecessary. [multi_snake rejection] User’s reasoning: single sequences use sequence_snake(), proportional distribution multiple sequences use survey_sequence() tabulated counts. need hybrid.

title: Learnings
text: [ESM auto-pivot] building wide data.frame ESM data, coerce_survey_input() may recognize raw responses due shape heuristic (nrow > unique_values * 2). Safer tabulate directly counts matrix within ESM pivot block. [ESM time positioning] esm_time_info[[k]]$time_frac NULL timestamp column provided. Must guard ESM tick positioning branch activate time_frac NULL, otherwise fall standard proportional zone rendering. [arc_fill “none” opacity] Using alpha_col() arc_opacity = 0.80 two-tone arc mode creates visible three-color artifacts semi-transparent halves overlap contrast background. Full opacity (alpha) makes arcs match band colors seamlessly. [correlation arc coloring] Purely absolute abs(r) scaling saturates correlations high (e.g., 0.89 vs 0.97 look identical). Purely relative scaling exaggerates tiny differences. Blended formula 0.85 * abs(r) + 0.15 * relative_rank provides good differentiation maintaining absolute meaning. [facet via par(mfrow)] survey_snake() calls plot.new() internally, naturally advances next panel par(mfrow) grid. Use match.call() manipulation recursive dispatch. cl[["x"]] <- NULL fails non-existent list elements — must guard ("x" %% names(cl)). [base R color complement] RGB complement: 255 - col2rgb(color) gives complementary color negative correlation tinting.

title: Snake Plots
text: beep-level data, var day auto-pivot one band per day. Ticks positioned within proportional zones response level:
code: survey_snake(ema_beeps, var = "angry", day = "day",              colors = snake_palettes$sunset, level_labels = labs5,              title = "Anger — 14 days, value distribution")

title: Snake Plots
text: daily data tick_shape = "bar" shows response distributions shift across days. Use bar_reverse = TRUE start highest level:
code: survey_snake(ema_beeps, var = "happy", day = "day",              tick_shape = "bar", bar_reverse = TRUE,              colors = snake_palettes$sunset, level_labels = labs5,              title = "Happiness — 14 days, distribution bars")

title: Snake Plots
text: activity_snake() shows daily event timelines — rug ticks duration blocks dark ribbon:  Pass character timestamps directly — parsed automatically:  Duration blocks show event length filled rectangles:  flow = "natural", bands read 6AM→12AM left--right — alternating. Compare: default boustrophedon flips morning events left right alternate rows, natural keeps consistently left:
code: set.seed(42) days <- c("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun") d <- data.frame(   day      = rep(days, each = 40),   start    = round(runif(280, 360, 1400)),   duration = 0 ) activity_snake(d) set.seed(42) dates <- seq(as.POSIXct("2024-03-11"), as.POSIXct("2024-03-17"),              by = "day") events <- data.frame(   timestamp = format(     rep(dates, each = 30) + round(runif(210, 6*3600, 22*3600)),     "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"   ),   stringsAsFactors = FALSE ) activity_snake(events, title = "From character timestamps — 7 days") set.seed(42) days <- c("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri", "Sat", "Sun") d2 <- data.frame(   day      = rep(days, each = 8),   start    = round(runif(56, 360, 1200)),   duration = round(runif(56, 15, 120)) ) activity_snake(d2, event_color = "#e09480", band_color = "#3d2518",                title = "Weekly activity — duration blocks") set.seed(1) d_morning <- data.frame(   day      = rep(days, each = 15),   start    = round(runif(105, 360, 720)),   duration = 0 ) activity_snake(d_morning, flow = "natural",                title = "Morning events — flow='natural' (6AM always left)")

title: Snake Plots
text: line_snake() draws continuous intensity line winding bands:
code: set.seed(42) hours <- seq(0, 1440, by = 10) d_line <- data.frame(   day   = rep(c("Mon", "Tue", "Wed", "Thu", "Fri"), each = length(hours)),   time  = rep(hours, 5),   value = sin(rep(hours, 5) / 1440 * 4 * pi) * 50 + 50 +           rnorm(5 * length(hours), 0, 8) ) line_snake(d_line, fill_color = "#e74c3c")

title: Snake Plots
text: timeline_snake() takes 3-column data.frame (role, start, end) auto-generates monthly blocks, transition labels, band year labels:

title: Snake Plots
text: sequence_snake() displays state sequence colored blocks flowing serpentine layout — block one time point colored state:  Pass data.frame directly — first character/factor column auto-detected:
code: set.seed(42) verbs <- c("Read", "Write", "Discuss", "Listen",            "Search", "Plan", "Code", "Review") seq75 <- character(0) while (length(seq75) < 75) {   seq75 <- c(seq75, rep(sample(verbs, 1), sample(1:4, 1))) } seq75 <- seq75[seq_len(75)] sequence_snake(seq75, title = "75-step learning sequence") set.seed(1) logs <- data.frame(   id     = 1:80,   action = sample(c("Read", "Write", "Discuss", "Search", "Code",                      "Plan", "Review", "Listen"), 80, replace = TRUE) ) sequence_snake(logs, rows = 5,                title = "From a data.frame — column auto-detected") #> Using column 'action' as sequence

title: Activity Snake Plot — activity_snake
code: activity_snake(   data,   band_height = 28,   band_gap = 18,   day_start = 360,   day_end = 1440,   plot_width = 500,   band_color = "#3d3d4a",   event_color = "#d4a843",   arc_color = "#2a2a3a",   band_opacity = 0.9,   arc_opacity = 0.85,   event_opacity = 0.85,   tick_width = 1.5,   show_grid = TRUE,   show_total = TRUE,   show_count = FALSE,   show_hour_labels = TRUE,   show_arc_labels = TRUE,   shadow = TRUE,   grid_color = "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)",   label_color = "#cccccc",   label_size = 0.85,   label_align = "left",   orientation = c("horizontal", "vertical"),   start_from = c("left", "right"),   flow = c("snake", "natural"),   day_format = NULL,   legend = NULL,   title = NULL,   margin = c(top = 30, right = 10, bottom = 50, left = 80),   background = "white" )

title: Activity Snake Plot — activity_snake
text: data Input one three formats. (1) POSIXct vector: bare vector timestamps, producing rug ticks grouped day. (2) Numeric format: data.frame columns day (character/factor day label), start (numeric minutes midnight, 0–1440), duration (numeric minutes; 0 = rug tick), optionally label (character event label). (3) Timestamp format: data.frame POSIXct column timestamp (start), optionally end (POSIXct; present, duration computed), duration (numeric minutes; used end absent), label (character event label). band_height Numeric. Height day band plot units (default 28). band_gap Numeric. Vertical gap bands (default 18). day_start Numeric. Start time window minutes midnight (default 360 = 6AM). day_end Numeric. End time window minutes midnight (default 1440 = midnight). plot_width Numeric. Width band area plot units (default 500). band_color Character character vector. Band ribbon color(s). vector, colors cycle per day (default "#3d3d4a"). event_color Character character vector. Event tick/block color(s). vector, colors cycle per day (default "#d4a843"). arc_color Character. Overnight arc color (default "#2a2a3a"). band_opacity Numeric 0-1 (default 0.90). arc_opacity Numeric 0-1 (default 0.85). event_opacity Numeric 0-1 (default 0.85). tick_width Numeric. Minimum event width plot units (default 1.5). Use 1.0 thin rug style. show_grid Logical. Show hour gridlines (default TRUE). show_total Logical. Show total duration day label (default TRUE). show_count Logical. Show event count parentheses day label (default FALSE). show_hour_labels Logical. Show hour labels bottom (default TRUE). show_arc_labels Logical. Show "12AM" arc tips (default TRUE). shadow Logical. Draw drop shadows (default TRUE). grid_color Character. Gridline color (default "rgba(255,255,255,0.25)"). label_color Character. Day label color (default "#cccccc"). label_size Numeric. Label font size multiplier (default 0.85). label_align Character. Label alignment: "left" (default), "right", "direction" (follows band reading direction). orientation Character: "horizontal" (default) "vertical". title: Sequence Index Snake Plot — sequence_snake
text: sequence Input flexible formats: Vector: character, integer, factor vector states. Data.frame: first character/factor column used. Comma-separated string: ",B,C," split automatically. List: unlisted vector. NA values dropped warning. states Character vector unique states desired order. NULL, derived unique(sequence). colors Named character vector colors keyed state, unnamed vector recycled match states. NULL, built-qualitative palette used. rows Integer, number serpentine rows. NULL, auto-calculated targeting approximately 10 blocks per band. band_height Numeric, height band pixels (default 28). band_gap Numeric, gap bands (default 18). plot_width Numeric, width band (default 500). margin Named numeric vector top, right, bottom, left margins. orientation Character, "horizontal" (default) "vertical". start_from Character, "left" (default) "right". flow Character, "natural" (default) "snake". "natural" reads bands left--right; "snake" uses alternating boustrophedon direction. Default "natural". show_labels Logical, show position range labels per row (default TRUE). show_legend Logical, draw color legend (default TRUE). show_numbers Logical, print small position numbers inside blocks (default FALSE). show_state Logical, print state name inside block (default FALSE). state_size Numeric, text size state labels (default 0.35). show_ticks Logical, draw ruler-style tick marks block boundaries outside bands (default FALSE). tick_labels Character vector labels evenly spaced ruler marks within band (e.g., month.abb monthly ticks). Implies show_ticks = TRUE. transition_labels Character vector date labels state transition points (e.g., c("Oct 2017", "Apr 2019")). One label per transition (length = number state changes). transition_pos Numeric vector fractional block positions transition labels (e.g., c(6.5, 24.3)). provided, labels placed exact interpolated positions along serpentine path rather state-change boundaries. tick_color Color tick marks (default "#333333"). tick_length Numeric, length tick marks pixels (default 5). tick_size Numeric, text size tick labels (default 0.4). style Character, "block" (default) "rug". "block" fills full band height colored blocks. "rug" draws thin colored tick marks dark ribbon, similar activity_snake. band_color Character, band ribbon color rug mode (default "#3d3d4a"). rug_opacity Numeric 0-1, opacity rug tick marks (default 0.9). jitter Numeric 0-1, vertical jitter fraction band height (default 0). > 0, tick marks scatter vertically across band instead sitting fixed position. border_color Color thin borders blocks, NA borders (default NA). block_labels Optional character vector labels display inside block (length sequence). Overrides show_numbers. band_labels Character vector labels display centered band (e.g., year labels). Length must equal rows. title Optional character string plot title. background Background color (default "white"). shadow Logical, draw drop shadows (default TRUE). text_size Numeric, text size multiplier block labels (default 0.5). legend_text_size Numeric, legend text size (default 0.8).

text: counts Input one four formats: Raw responses (data.frame) — column survey item, row respondent. Responses auto-tabulated counts. labels levels inferred column names unique values. Simplest usage: survey_snake(survey_df). Counts matrix — rows = items, columns = response levels. Counts data.frame — coerced matrix. ESM / longitudinal data.frame — var timestamp provided, data automatically pivoted day. band becomes one day. Ticks positioned time--day. labels Character vector item labels (length = nrow(counts)). levels Character vector level labels (length = ncol(counts)). var Character, column name response variable ESM mode. provided day, data auto-pivoted period. day Character, column name day/period grouping variable (e.g. "day"). unique value becomes one band. timestamp Character, column name POSIXct timestamp ESM mode. provided alongside var day, ticks positioned time--day within band. level_labels Optional named character vector mapping raw level values display labels (e.g. c("1"="Str. Disagree", "5"="Str. Agree")). Applied legend level-based text. unnamed length levels, used positionally. band_height Numeric (default 28). band_gap Numeric (default 18). plot_width Numeric (default 500). tick_shape Character: "line" (default), "dot", "bar" (stacked proportional bars percentage labels). bar_reverse Logical. TRUE tick_shape = "bar", draw segments highest level (left) lowest (right). Default FALSE. tick_opacity Numeric 0-1 (default 0.55). level_gap Numeric. Gap response-level zones plot units (default 15). Set 0 separation. color_mode Character, "level" (color response level) "individual" (unique hue per respondent). Default "level". colors Character vector colors response levels. Default uses diverging palette. shade_band Logical. Shade band body item mean (default TRUE). show_mean Logical. Diamond marker mean (default TRUE). show_median Logical. Vertical line median (default FALSE). show_correlation Logical. Show Pearson r U-turns (default TRUE). jitter_range Numeric. Vertical jitter fraction (default 0.22). sort_by Character: "none", "mean", "net" (default "none"). shadow Logical (default TRUE). label_color Character (default "#333333"). label_size Numeric (default 0.85). label_align Character. Label alignment: "left" (default), "right", "direction" (follows band reading direction). show_legend Logical (default TRUE). legend_text_size Numeric, legend text size (default 0.65). arc_color Character (default "#2c3e6b"). arc_opacity Numeric (default 0.80). arc_fill Character controlling arc fill style: "none" (default) Two-tone split: upper half colored upper band's mean shade, lower half lower band's mean shade. "correlation" Brown/blue tint correlation sign, opacity scaled |r|. original behavior. "mean_prev" Solid fill using upper (preceding) band's mean shade. "blend" Solid fill: 50/50 RGB average adjacent band shades. band_palette Character vector 2+ anchor colors band shading gradient. Low item means map first color, high means last. Default NULL uses built-brown--slate ramp. darker plots try c("#1a1228", "#1a2a42"). start_from Character: "left" (default) "right". side first band starts . flow Character, "snake" (default) "natural". "snake" uses alternating boustrophedon direction; "natural" reads bands direction. facet Logical named list. TRUE, columns auto-grouped name prefix (e.g. LOC1-LOC5 → "LOC") group drawn facet panel. named list column-name vectors gives explicit grouping. Default FALSE. facet_ncol Integer, number columns facet grid (default 2). title Optional plot title. margin Named numeric vector. background Background color. seed Integer reproducible jitter (default 42).

title: Timeline Snake Plot — timeline_snake
text: sequence Either character/factor vector states (one per time unit), data.frame 3 columns: state/role, start date ("YYYY-MM" Date), end date. data.frame given, function auto-generates monthly blocks, transition labels, band labels. states Character vector unique states desired order. NULL, derived unique(sequence). colors Named character vector colors keyed state, unnamed vector recycled match states. NULL, built-qualitative palette used. rows Integer, number serpentine rows. NULL, auto-calculated targeting approximately 10 blocks per band. band_height Numeric, height band (default 28). band_gap Numeric, gap bands (default 18). plot_width Numeric, width band (default 500). margin Named numeric vector top, right, bottom, left margins (default c(top = 35, right = 10, bottom = 65, left = 20)). orientation Character, "horizontal" (default) "vertical". start_from Character, "left" (default) "right". flow Character, "natural" (default) "snake". "natural" reads bands left--right; "snake" uses alternating boustrophedon direction. show_labels Logical, show position range labels (default FALSE). show_legend Logical, draw color legend (default TRUE). show_numbers Logical, print small position numbers inside blocks (default FALSE). show_state Logical, show state names inside blocks (default TRUE). state_size Numeric, state label size (default 1). show_ticks Logical, draw ruler-style tick marks block boundaries outside bands (default FALSE). tick_labels Character vector labels evenly spaced ruler marks within band (e.g., month.abb monthly ticks). Implies show_ticks = TRUE. transition_labels Character vector date labels state transition points (e.g., c("Oct 2017", "Apr 2019")). One label per transition (length = number state changes). transition_pos Numeric vector fractional block positions transition labels (e.g., c(6.5, 24.3)). provided, labels placed exact interpolated positions along serpentine path rather state-change boundaries. tick_color Color tick marks (default "#333333"). tick_length Numeric, length tick marks pixels (default 5). tick_size Numeric, text size band transition labels (default 0.8). border_color Color thin borders blocks, NA borders (default NA). block_labels Optional character vector labels display inside block (length sequence). Overrides show_numbers. band_labels Character vector labels display centered band (e.g., year labels). Length must equal rows. title Optional character string plot title. background Background color (default "white"). shadow Logical, draw drop shadows (default TRUE). text_size Numeric, text size multiplier block labels (default 0.5). legend_text_size Numeric, legend text size (default 1.2).

title: Snake Plot Family — Specification for R Package Implementation
text: “snake plot” family set survey activity visualizations use serpentine (boustrophedon) layout: horizontal bands alternate direction row--row, connected U-turn arcs alternating edges. creates continuous, flowing ribbon eye follows naturally top bottom. 9 plot types total survey visualization suite. Three use snake/serpentine layout: 5 (Survey Bar, Heatmap, Dot Strip, Cumulative, Rug) use standard non-serpentine layouts covered .

title: Snake Plot Family — Specification for R Package Implementation
text: daily activity timeline band one day colored ticks/blocks dark ribbon represent events. serpentine layout connects days via U-turn arcs (representing overnight/sleep transitions). Hour gridlines labels provide time reference. fundamentally different survey snake plots: instead Likert response data, takes timestamped events.

title: Snake Plot Family — Specification for R Package Implementation
text: Time convention: times minutes midnight. - 0 = 12:00 (midnight) - 360 = 6:00 - 720 = 12:00 PM (noon) - 1080 = 6:00 PM - 1440 = 12:00 (next midnight) Two event modes: 1. Duration blocks (duration > 0): Event width proportional duration. Good screen time, work sessions, exercise periods. 2. Rug ticks (duration = 0): Thin vertical ticks event timestamp. Good point events like messages, landings, heartbeats. Set minTickWidth: 1.5 thin rug style.
code: ActivityDay {   label: string          // "Mon", "Tuesday", "2024-01-15", "Day 1", etc.   events: ActivityEvent[] }  ActivityEvent {   start: number       // Start time in MINUTES FROM MIDNIGHT (0–1440)   duration: number    // Duration in minutes (0 = rug tick / point event)   label?: string      // Optional event label (shown in tooltip) }

title: Snake Plot Family — Specification for R Package Implementation
text: Compute layout: rowStep = bandHeight + bandGap. day occupies one row. turnRadius = rowStep / 2. turning pad left right = turnRadius + bandHeight/2 + 8. Time--X mapping: Linear mapping [dayStart, dayEnd] [xLeft, xRight]. Draw shadow rectangles: Semi-transparent rectangles behind band depth. Draw bands arcs: band rect (xLeft, y - bandH/2, plotWidth, bandH) band color. arc connects band band +1. Odd-indexed arcs go right, even go left. Arc shape: semicircular path one band’s edge next band’s edge. “12AM” label arc tip (outermost point semicircle). Draw hour gridlines: Vertical white lines whole hour across bands. Draw event ticks: day, event: Convert event.start x position via time--X mapping Width = max(minTickWidth, (duration / daySpan) * plotWidth) Clamp stay within [xLeft, xRight] Draw colored rectangle top dark band Draw labels: Day labels gap bands. First day’s label goes band. Draw legend: Colored swatches labels plot area.

title: Snake Plot Family — Specification for R Package Implementation
text: Hovering event tick shows: Day label, Time range (start – end), Duration (e.g., “1h 30m”), Activity label (provided) Event tick brightens full opacity hover

title: Snake Plot Family — Specification for R Package Implementation
text: Boustrophedon flow: Odd rows left→right, even rows right→left. U-turn arcs create visual continuity. Dark--light Activity Snake: bands dark (like film strip), events light/colored ticks top. makes activity “pop” timeline. Light--dark Survey Snake: Band body gradient shading mean. Tick marks markers sit top. Proportional representation: snake types, position width encodes data value (response level, time, duration). Serpentine reading order: Labels, percentages, data respect alternating direction. Even rows Survey Sequence reversed segment order colors flow continuously arcs. Minimal chrome: Light gridlines, subtle shadows, clean typography. data dominate.

title: snakeplot 0.3.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-03-16 New flow parameter snake functions: "snake" (boustrophedon, default functions) "natural" (rows read left--right, default timeline_snake() sequence_snake()). New multi_snake() function faceted multi-construct panels. New sequence_snake() function categorical sequence visualization. New timeline_snake() function state-transition timelines. Added Sonsoles Lopez-Pernas package author. Bug fixes: survey_sequence arc gradient, survey_snake first end cap, multi_snake end cap polygon arguments, activity_snake arc labels.

title: snakeplot 0.2.0
text: 10 built-color palettes via snake_palettes snake_palette(): 5 diverging (classic, earth, ocean, sunset, berry) 5 sequential (blues, greens, grays, warm, viridis). New band_palette parameter custom band shading colors. New bar_reverse parameter draw bars highest level first. ema_beeps expanded 500 sampled rows full 11 474 beeps. Tick width capped sparse daily data prevent overly thick ticks. Dot size increased (cex 0.5 → 0.9) better visibility. Vignette README rewritten snake_palettes$ocean examples. 100% test coverage (292 tests).

title: snakeplot 0.1.0
text: Initial release. survey_snake(): Survey response snake plots distribution bars, tick marks, inter-item correlation arcs, faceting, daily EMA support. activity_snake(): Daily activity timeline event blocks rug ticks. survey_sequence(): Stacked 100% horizontal bar plots serpentine layout. sequential_dist(): Sequential palette variant survey_sequence(). line_snake(): Continuous intensity line plot (experimental). facet_snake(): Generic multi-panel faceting wrapper. Three bundled datasets: ema_emotions, student_survey, ema_beeps.
